description.value:
Optional called-shot support feat for PAcS. The module detects this exact feat name on an actor. In RAW-adapted mode it grants a +2 bonus on called-shot attack rolls and allows one called shot when a standard or full-round action produces multiple attacks.

This is PF1e-derived optional-rule scaffolding adapted for D35E, not D&D 3.5 rules as written.

system.bookSource: PF1e Ultimate Combat, called shot optional rules (adapted for D35E)

description.value:
Optional called-shot support feat for PAcS. The module detects this exact feat name on an actor. In RAW-adapted mode it allows multiple called shots in the same round, applies an additional -5 penalty to each called shot after the first, and treats 40 damage as the minimum for a debilitating blow.

This is PF1e-derived optional-rule scaffolding adapted for D35E, not D&D 3.5 rules as written.

system.requirements: Int 13, Combat Expertise, Improved Called Shot, base attack bonus +6
system.bookSource: PF1e Ultimate Combat, called shot optional rules (adapted for D35E)
